summary:
The enzyme pyruvate kinase is unique among those discussed because its primary function supports glycolysis rather than gluconeogenesis; thus, it cannot be considered an enzyme specifically involved in gluconeogenesis. Therefore,
\boxed{\text{pyruvate kinase}}.
